Brazil vs Japan Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Brazil vs Japan Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Brazil vs Japan clash at NRG Stadium in Houston for their 2026 World Cup Round of 32 knockout tie. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on June 29, 2026 3:03AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 29, 2026 3:03AM EST

# Brazil vs Japan Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Brazil meet Japan at NRG Stadium in Houston with a place in the Round of 16 on the line, and while Brazil are the favorites, writing Japan off would be a mistake. Manager Carlo Ancelotti's side topped Group C and arrived with a statement, a dominant win over Scotland one of the most impressive displays of the group stage. Japan came through Group F as runners-up, slick and well-organized, and they showed against the Netherlands that

news_items.title: Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US
news_items.author: Celine Abrahams
news_items.text:
Brazil vs Japan FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US

WATCH SECURELY FROM ANYWHERE

Jun 29, 2026 07:47+02:00

TV Guide & Streaming

Brazil vs Japan

Brazil

Japan

World Cup

Comprehensive match preview of Brazil vs Japan at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news, and more ahead of this Round of 32 clash in Houston.

### Brazil vs Japan: Match details

World Cup - Final Stage

Houston Stadium

Brazil vs Japan in the World Cup Round of 32 kicks off on June 29, 2026, at 20:00 GMT and 15:00 EST.

Getty Images

## Brazil meets Japan in a historic knockout clash

Five-time world champions Brazil face an incredibly disciplined and dangerous Japan side at the NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas, with a coveted place in the last 16 on the line. While the Seleção always carries the heavy burden of expected tournament dominance, the Samurai Blue have proven time and again that they possess the structural cohesion and technical capacity to compromise the world's absolute elite in single-elimination football.

## How the Seleção and Samurai Blue got here

Japan's road to the last 32 has reinforced their evolution into a premier global football power. The Samurai

Comprehensive match preview of Brazil vs Japan at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news, and more ahead of this Round of 32 clash in Houston.

### Brazil vs Japan: Match details

World Cup - Final Stage

Houston Stadium

Brazil vs Japan in the World Cup Round of 32 kicks off on June 29, 2026, at 20:00 GMT and 15:00 EST.

Getty Images

## Brazil meets Japan in a historic knockout clash

Five-time world champions Brazil face an incredibly disciplined and dangerous Japan side at the NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas, with a coveted place in the last 16 on the line. While the Seleção always carries the heavy burden of expected tournament dominance, the Samurai Blue have proven time and again that they possess the structural cohesion and technical capacity to compromise the world's absolute elite in single-elimination football.

## How the Seleção and Samurai Blue got here

Japan's road to the last 32 has reinforced their evolution into a premier global football power. The Samurai"}
